utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully specified with detailed information: (1) 'property' includes name, address, type, price, features, and fees; (2) 'financing' includes buyers, income, down payment, mortgage details, rate, payment, and closing costs; (3) 'legal_services' includes package, detailed cost breakdown, and total; (4) 'moving_services' includes provider, date, detailed costs, and total; (5) 'setup_services' includes electricity, internet, water, and total setup cost; (6) 'total_budget' includes full cost breakdown and total. All are complete and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes a purchase property named 'Liberty Lofts, Unit 1107' priced at CAD $465,000. In the ground-truth list of purchase properties, the closest comparable option is 'Modern Apartment' (modern design, city location, slightly above but near budget) with a rating of 9. The financing section uses a standard mortgage setup (5.1% fixed, 25-year amortization, 33% down payment), which corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option with rating 8. The legal package chosen is 'Basic Legal Package' with rating 9. The moving service is 'Standard Moving Service (move_standard_001)', which matches 'Standard Moving' rated 9. The setup services total CAD $180, covering electricity, internet, and water—this aligns most closely with 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).
